system.description: *The Final Reading. The full accounting.* Target one creature within 40 feet. Deal 28 + RESONANCE resonant damage. Apply Expose 6, Vulnerable 5, Silence, Stagger, and Root simultaneously. Choose one judgment: (A) **Absolved** — remove all debuffs from all allies within 30 feet, restore 12 + RESONANCE HP to each. (B) **Condemned** — the target takes an additional 14 + RESONANCE resonant damage at the start of each of their next three turns. Both judgments carry the force of formal Sutensai law. Cost: pay 20 HP instead of 3 AP (play for 0 AP + 20 HP).
